localizations.title: Doo-Arann's Dungeon
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Did you check the inside edge of the well?
localizations.hint_5: You'd better shield yourself from his breath.
localizations.hint_6: Hold your device's camera over a card, then draw one of the magic symbols. This will allow you to cast the corresponding spell.
localizations.hint_12: You need a weapon to fight it. The dead adventurer might have one in their pack.
localizations.hint_18_first: This torch will soon go out. Magic can help.
localizations.hint_18: You may be able to take some of the burning flame with the Attraction spell.
localizations.hint_21: You should ignite this grenade to make it explode.
localizations.hint_22_first: Line up the blue lines on the two cards, then place this arrow's nock in the center of the bowstring. Finally, aim at the creature. A word will appear.
localizations.hint_22: You will find the dragon's weak point marked on the parchment.
localizations.hint_23: Thanks to this sword, you will be able to fight certain creatures.
localizations.hint_24: Once you have collected the parchment (29) and the bow (78), open this door with a key.
localizations.hint_29: This drawing will be useful when facing the dragon.
localizations.hint_33_first: You must use magic to defeat him.
localizations.hint_33: The magic pentacle on the parchment (29) can help you.
localizations.hint_35_first: Align the bow with the dragon to aim an arrow at him.
localizations.hint_35: The dragon's weak point is indicated on the parchment. Look at his head!
localizations.hint_39: You can now destroy a weakened wall with this grenade.
localizations.hint_43_first: The constellation may help you to open the lion's mouth.
localizations.hint_43: The shape is essential. The positioning of the dots in the constellation will help you.
localizations.hint_46_first: Water elementals are susceptible to cold. Cast a spell against it.
localizations.hint_46: Once you have cast the spell, shatter the ice to destroy the elemental.
localizations.hint_48: The object is out of reach. So, how can you draw it to yourself?
localizations.hint_50_first: It is very dark. Illuminating this wall will help you continue your adventure.
localizations.hint_50: The torch on the wall may be useful.
localizations.hint_60: This key can open the locked door (24).
localizations.hint_68_first: By rotating the discs, the crystals can form a design.
localizations.hint_68: The pattern on the wall of the alcove (43) can be used as a template.
localizations.hint_78_first: This bow will only be useful against the dragon.
localizations.hint_78: Align the bow with the dragon and loose an arrow at him.
localizations.hint_84_first: Dodge the arrows that are going to hit you.
localizations.hint_84: Use the edge of a card to determine their trajectories.
localizations.hint_94: Closely examine the inside edge of the well… and be careful!
localizations.hint_99_first: You've seen this pack of holding somewhere before… but where?
localizations.hint_99: You had one in your hands before you started this adventure.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Shield yourself from his breath (31 + modifier +2 = 33).
localizations.answer_hint_12: Attack it with the sword you found in the pack of holding (99).
localizations.answer_hint_18: Use the Attraction spell on the torch, then point your device's camera at card 6 to insert the flame into the indicated space.
localizations.answer_hint_21: Cast the Flame spell (9) on the fuse to ignite it.
localizations.answer_hint_22: Line up the blue lines on the two cards, then place this arrow's nock in the center of the bowstring (78). Aim at the dragon's eye (35). Reading from the nock to the eye, you can see the word FIVE.
localizations.answer_hint_24: Unlock the door with the key (60).
localizations.answer_hint_33: Draw all three magic symbols, one after the other, to create the magic pentacle depicted on the parchment.
localizations.answer_hint_35: Line up the blue lines on the two cards, then place this arrow's nock in the center of the bowstring (78). Aim at the dragon's eye (35). Reading from the nock to the eye, you can see the word FIVE.
localizations.answer_hint_39: You can destroy the wall using the grenade (43).
localizations.answer_hint_43: You can destroy the wall using the grenade (39).
localizations.answer_hint_46: You can freeze it using the Blizzard spell found on card 6.
localizations.answer_hint_48: You can retrieve the key using the Attraction spell found on card 6.
localizations.answer_hint_50: You can ignite the torch using the Flame spell found on card 9.
localizations.answer_hint_68: The constellation of Leo on the alcove wall (43) serves as a template. Activate the machine and reproduce the constellation by rotating the three discs on card 68.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Line up the blue lines on the two cards, then place this arrow's nock in the center of the bowstring (78). Aim at the dragon's eye (35). Reading from the nock to the eye, you can see the word FIVE.
localizations.answer_hint_84: Use the edge of a card to trace imaginary lines to see the trajectory of each arrow. Then select the four arrows that would hit you.
localizations.answer_hint_94: You can see the hidden number 46 on the inside edge of the well.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Look at the bottom of the pack of holding (the box from which the cards were retrieved to play this adventure). You will see number 23.
localizations.machine_84: You manage to dodge the arrows and find yourself in a poorly-lit dead-end.
localizations.end: EXCELLENT! The dragon is defeated. You retrieve his treasure and slip it into the pack of holding before leaving Doo-Arann’s Dungeon. You are now ready to face new dangers. You wonder why you didn't cross paths with the malevolent sorcerer, Doo-Arann.  Well, who knows; maybe someday, you will seek him out. But that's another story...
localizations.machine_6_card_12: Magic cannot harm it. You must use a weapon.
